title: Flood Risk Assessment in Northern Thailand
description: Developed SWAT hydrological models to evaluate flood risk in Northern Thai watersheds under climate change scenarios
shortDescription: SWAT-based flood risk modelling for Thai watersheds
content:
# Flood Risk Assessment Project

This project aims to understand flood risks in Northern Thailand watersheds using advanced hydrological modelling.

objectives: Develop SWAT models for 5 key watersheds
Assess flood risk under different climate scenarios
Identify nature-based solutions for risk reduction

title: MESSHI: Suspended Sediment Monitoring
description: Established suspended sediment monitoring network in Himalayan rivers using optical backscatter (OBS) sensors and citizen science approaches
shortDescription: Himalayan river sediment monitoring with citizen science
content:
# MESSHI Project Overview

Established comprehensive suspended sediment monitoring across Himalayan river systems.

objectives: Deploy OBS sensors at 10+ remote sites
